reference: Hello. The rounded, slightly painful swelling next to the left testis is most likely caused by what is called an epididymal cyst. This can easily be confirmed on examination, preferably by a urologist. The treatment depends on the size, duration, and findings on a scrotal scan, if indicated. Most of these resolve with medical treatment, so there is no cause for anxiety.
text: Hello. The rounded, slightly painful swelling next to the left testis is most likely caused by what is called an epididymal cyst. This can easily be confirmed on examination, preferably by a urologist. The treatment depends on the size, duration, and findings on a scrotal scan if indicated. Most of these resolve with medical treatment, so there is no cause for anxiety.
